title: Email Validator API
description: Validate email addresses with MX verification, SMTP checks, and disposable email detection. Use Standby mode for real-time API access.

emails.title: Email List (Bulk)
emails.description: Array of email addresses for bulk validation (max 50)

mode.title: Mode
mode.description: Validation mode: 'validate' for full check, 'disposable' for disposable-only check
